title: The Fear of God and Worship
reading:
Biblical worship flows from awe.

The heavenly beings around God's throne continually worship because they continually behold His greatness. When reverence diminishes, worship becomes entertainment. When reverence increases, worship becomes surrender.

True worship recognizes God's worthiness. When you stay in wonder, you will never wander.
reflection:
What motivates your worship?

Do you worship only when you feel like it?

How does awe affect worship?
abide: May my worship be filled with reverence, gratitude, and wonder.
